summary: Excellent audience recording captures a stellar Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain jam.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear, gorgeous sound of this audience source, calling it the go‑to version for the show. The performance is highlighted by an outstanding Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain sequence that many consider one of the best of its kind. Overall the recording is highly listenable and the music shines.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are very positive (5 and 4 stars) and praise both sound quality and a standout jam, indicating a high‑quality show with an excellent recording despite the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as wonderful sounding, gorgeous, and the best audience source; clear, warm mix with no reported issues.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
